seo.title: Blueprint — logic mapping before your Automation Sprint
seo.description: Paid Blueprint phase maps your firm's business logic and fixes your Automation Sprint quote before full build. De-risk scope, timeline, and AI spend.

hero.headline: Blueprint: lock scope, timeline, and price before you commit to the build
hero.subheadline: Most automation projects fail because someone starts building before they map the actual workflow. Blueprint is a paid logic-mapping engagement: 2 weeks, we map your exact workflows and edge cases, lock scope and price in writing, and give you a clear go/no-go decision. No surprises. No scope creep. No blank checks.

deliverables: Workflow logic map aligned to how your firm actually operates
Fixed-scope Automation Sprint quote (scope, timeline, price)
Written hard monthly AI spend cap for the proposed workflow
Go / no-go recommendation with honest fit assessment
outcomes: No surprise scope creep after kickoff
Clear single-workflow focus for the sprint
Decision-ready package for the managing partner

nextStep.headline: Book a call
nextStep.description: 30 minutes with a senior operator. We qualify fit, name the highest-ROI workflow, and explain next steps. Below 60 on the ICP scorecard — we'll say so politely.
